mean_en: a small amount of money that is regularly given to children by their parents; an amount of money that can be earned or received before you start paying tax
sentence: This flight has a baggage allowance of 20 kg per passenger.
sentence_trans: 这趟航班每位乘客的行李限额为20公斤。
word_etyma: allow分配；发津贴 + ance行为，性质 → allowance津贴
